---
title: "Pioneers and Founders, or, Recent Workers in the Mission Field. By C. M. Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe”."
---

## Pioneers and Founders, or, Recent Workers in the Mission Field. By C. M. Yonge, author of “The Heir of Redclyffe”.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1871
**Genre:** Non-fiction: biography
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: Macmillan and Co.

### Notes

The preface is dated 17 March 1871.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
